revision.text:
{{navbar|Talkback see also|plain=y}}
* {{tl|Talkback}} – the original, large "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages ** {{tls|Mytalk}} – invokes the talkback template and automatically fills in your username ** {{tl|Talkbacktiny}} – a somewhat smaller version of {{tnull|Talkback}} * {{tl|Interwiki talkback}} – a "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages for interwiki purposes * {{tl|Whisperback}} – a less obtrusive template than {{tnull|Talkback}}, with more features and without the box * {{tl|You've got mail}} – like {{tnull|Talkback}} but to notify of an offsite e-mail * {{tl|Please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Whisperback}}, but notifying others of a topic they may wish to participate in ** {{tl|WikiProject please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Please see}}, but for use on WikiProject talk pages * {{tl|Discussion notice}} – an alternative to {{tnull|Please see}}, similar to {{tnull|ANI-notice}} * {{tl|Usertalkback}} and {{tl|Userwhisperback}} – notices for the top of one's own user talk page, so as to inform your interlocutors of your user discussion preferences * {{tl|FYI}} – icon box to give a visual hint to readers of talk page items * {{tl|Notified}} – disclosure indicating that a notification has been posted on another page * {{tl|Reply to}} – ping a user without posting on their talk page (uses the [[Help:Notifications#Mentions|mentions notification]]) * {{tl|Response}} – to direct the attention of another user to a discussion on a specific talk page * {{Tl|No talkback}} – opt-out of talkback messages from [[WP:Twinkle|Twinkle]] {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Talkback see also|plain=y}}
* {{tl|Talkback}} – the original, large "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages ** {{tls|Mytalk}} – invokes the talkback template and automatically fills in your username ** {{tl|Talkbacktiny}} – a somewhat smaller version of {{tnull|Talkback}} * {{tl|Interwiki talkback}} – a "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages for interwiki purposes * {{tl|Whisperback}} – a less obtrusive template than {{tnull|Talkback}}, with more features and without the box * {{tl|You've got mail}} – like {{tnull|Talkback}} but to notify of an offsite e-mail * {{tl|Please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Whisperback}}, but notifying others of a topic they may wish to participate in ** {{tl|WikiProject please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Please see}}, but for use on WikiProject talk pages * {{tl|Discussion notice}} – an alternative to {{tnull|Please see}}, similar to {{tnull|ANI-notice}} * {{tl|Usertalkback}} and {{tl|Userwhisperback}} – notices for the top of one's own user talk page, so as to inform your interlocutors of your user discussion preferences * {{tl|FYI}} – icon box to give a visual hint to readers of talk page items * {{tl|Notified}} – disclosure indicating that a notification has been posted on another page * {{tl|Reply to}} – ping a user without posting on their talk page (uses the [[Help:Notifications#Mentions|mentions notification]]) * {{tl|Response}} – to direct the attention of another user to a discussion on a specific talk page * {{Tl|No talkback}} – opt-out of talkback messages from [[WP:Twinkle|Twinkle]] {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{navbar|Talkback see also|plain=y}}
* {{tl|Talkback}} – the original, large "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages ** {{tls|Mytalk}} – invokes the talkback template and automatically fills in your username ** {{tl|Talkbacktiny}} – a somewhat smaller version of {{tnull|Talkback}} * {{tl|Interwiki talkback}} – a "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages for interwiki purposes * {{tl|Whisperback}} – a less obtrusive template than {{tnull|Talkback}}, with more features and without the box * {{tl|You've got mail}} – like {{tnull|Talkback}} but to notify of an offsite e-mail * {{tl|Please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Whisperback}}, but notifying others of a topic they may wish to participate in ** {{tl|WikiProject please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Please see}}, but for use on WikiProject talk pages * {{tl|Discussion notice}} – an alternative to {{tnull|Please see}}, similar to {{tnull|ANI-notice}} * {{tl|Usertalkback}} and {{tl|Userwhisperback}} – notices for the top of one's own user talk page, so as to inform your interlocutors of your user discussion preferences * {{tl|FYI}} – icon box to give a visual hint to readers of talk page items * {{tl|Notified}} – disclosure indicating that a notification has been posted on another page * {{tl|Reply to}} – ping a user without posting on their talk page (uses the [[Help:Notifications#Mentions|mentions notification]]) * {{tl|Response}} – to direct the attention of another user to a discussion on a specific talk page * {{Tl|No talkback}} – opt-out of talkback messages from [[WP:Twinkle|Twinkle]] {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{navbar|Talkback see also|plain=y}}
* {{tl|Talkback}} – the original, large "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages ** {{tls|Mytalk}} – invokes the talkback template and automatically fills in your username ** {{tl|Talkbacktiny}} – a somewhat smaller version of {{tnull|Talkback}} * {{tl|Interwiki talkback}} – a "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages for interwiki purposes * {{tl|Whisperback}} – a less obtrusive template than {{tnull|Talkback}}, with more features and without the box * {{tl|You've got mail}} – like {{tnull|Talkback}} but to notify of an offsite e-mail * {{tl|Please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Whisperback}}, but notifying others of a topic they may wish to participate in ** {{tl|WikiProject please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Please see}}, but for use on WikiProject talk pages * {{tl|Discussion notice}} – an alternative to {{tnull|Please see}}, similar to {{tnull|ANI-notice}} * {{tl|Usertalkback}} and {{tl|Userwhisperback}} – notices for the top of one's own user talk page, so as to inform your interlocutors of your user discussion preferences * {{tl|FYI}} – icon box to give a visual hint to readers of talk page items * {{tl|Notified}} – disclosure indicating that a notification has been posted on another page * {{tl|Reply to}} – ping a user without posting on their talk page (uses the [[Help:Notifications#Mentions|mentions notification]]) * {{tl|Response}} – to direct the attention of another user to a discussion on a specific talk page * {{Tl|No talkback}} – opt-out of talkback messages from [[WP:Twinkle|Twinkle]] {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{navbar|Talkback see also|plain=y}}
* {{tl|Talkback}} – the original, large "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages ** {{tls|Mytalk}} – invokes the talkback template and automatically fills in your username ** {{tl|Talkbacktiny}} – a somewhat smaller version of {{tnull|Talkback}} * {{tl|Interwiki talkback}} – a "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages for interwiki purposes * {{tl|Whisperback}} – a less obtrusive template than {{tnull|Talkback}}, with more features and without the box * {{tl|You've got mail}} – like {{tnull|Talkback}} but to notify of an offsite e-mail * {{tl|Please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Whisperback}}, but notifying others of a topic they may wish to participate in ** {{tl|WikiProject please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Please see}}, but for use on WikiProject talk pages * {{tl|Discussion notice}} – an alternative to {{tnull|Please see}}, similar to {{tnull|ANI-notice}} * {{tl|Usertalkback}} and {{tl|Userwhisperback}} – notices for the top of one's own user talk page, so as to inform your interlocutors of your user discussion preferences * {{tl|FYI}} – icon box to give a visual hint to readers of talk page items * {{tl|Notified}} – disclosure indicating that a notification has been posted on another page * {{tl|Reply to}} – ping a user without posting on their talk page (uses the [[Help:Notifications#Mentions|mentions notification]]) * {{tl|Response}} – to direct the attention of another user to a discussion on a specific talk page * {{Tl|No talkback}} – opt-out of talkback messages from [[WP:Twinkle|Twinkle]] {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Talkback see also|plain=y}}
* {{tl|Talkback}} – the original, large "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages ** {{tls|Mytalk}} – invokes the talkback template and automatically fills in your username ** {{tl|Talkbacktiny}} – a somewhat smaller version of {{tnull|Talkback}} * {{tl|Interwiki talkback}} – a "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages for interwiki purposes * {{tl|Whisperback}} – a less obtrusive template than {{tnull|Talkback}}, with more features and without the box * {{tl|You've got mail}} – like {{tnull|Talkback}} but to notify of an offsite e-mail * {{tl|Please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Whisperback}}, but notifying others of a topic they may wish to participate in ** {{tl|WikiProject please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Please see}}, but for use on WikiProject talk pages * {{tl|Discussion notice}} – an alternative to {{tnull|Please see}}, similar to {{tnull|ANI-notice}} * {{tl|Usertalkback}} and {{tl|Userwhisperback}} – notices for the top of one's own user talk page, so as to inform your interlocutors of your user discussion preferences * {{tl|FYI}} – icon box to give a visual hint to readers of talk page items * {{tl|Notified}} – disclosure indicating that a notification has been posted on another page * {{tl|Reply to}} – ping a user without posting on their talk page (uses the [[Help:Notifications#Mentions|mentions notification]]) * {{tl|Response}} – to direct the attention of another user to a discussion on a specific talk page * {{Tl|No talkback}} – opt-out of talkback messages from [[WP:Twinkle|Twinkle]] {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{navbar|Talkback see also|plain=y}}
* {{tl|Talkback}} – the original, large "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages ** {{tls|Mytalk}} – invokes the talkback template and automatically fills in your username ** {{tl|Talkbacktiny}} – a somewhat smaller version of {{tnull|Talkback}} * {{tl|Interwiki talkback}} – a "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages for interwiki purposes * {{tl|Whisperback}} – a less obtrusive template than {{tnull|Talkback}}, with more features and without the box * {{tl|You've got mail}} – like {{tnull|Talkback}} but to notify of an offsite e-mail * {{tl|Please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Whisperback}}, but notifying others of a topic they may wish to participate in ** {{tl|WikiProject please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Please see}}, but for use on WikiProject talk pages * {{tl|Discussion notice}} – an alternative to {{tnull|Please see}}, similar to {{tnull|ANI-notice}} * {{tl|Usertalkback}} and {{tl|Userwhisperback}} – notices for the top of one's own user talk page, so as to inform your interlocutors of your user discussion preferences * {{tl|FYI}} – icon box to give a visual hint to readers of talk page items * {{tl|Notified}} – disclosure indicating that a notification has been posted on another page * {{tl|Reply to}} – ping a user without posting on their talk page (uses the [[Help:Notifications#Mentions|mentions notification]]) * {{tl|Response}} – to direct the attention of another user to a discussion on a specific talk page * {{Tl|No talkback}} – opt-out of talkback messages from [[WP:Twinkle|Twinkle]] {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Talkback see also|plain=y}}
* {{tl|Talkback}} – the original, large "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages ** {{tls|Mytalk}} – invokes the talkback template and automatically fills in your username ** {{tl|Talkbacktiny}} – a somewhat smaller version of {{tnull|Talkback}} * {{tl|Interwiki talkback}} – a "you have new messages" notice to put on other users' talk pages for interwiki purposes * {{tl|Whisperback}} – a less obtrusive template than {{tnull|Talkback}}, with more features and without the box * {{tl|You've got mail}} – like {{tnull|Talkback}} but to notify of an offsite e-mail * {{tl|Please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Whisperback}}, but notifying others of a topic they may wish to participate in ** {{tl|WikiProject please see}} – similar to {{tnull|Please see}}, but for use on WikiProject talk pages * {{tl|Discussion notice}} – an alternative to {{tnull|Please see}}, similar to {{tnull|ANI-notice}} * {{tl|Usertalkback}} and {{tl|Userwhisperback}} – notices for the top of one's own user talk page, so as to inform your interlocutors of your user discussion preferences * {{tl|FYI}} – icon box to give a visual hint to readers of talk page items * {{tl|Notified}} – disclosure indicating that a notification has been posted on another page * {{tl|Reply to}} – ping a user without posting on their talk page (uses the [[Help:Notifications#Mentions|mentions notification]]) * {{tl|Response}} – to direct the attention of another user to a discussion on a specific talk page * {{Tl|No talkback}} – opt-out of talkback messages from [[WP:Twinkle|Twinkle]] {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
